name: BEL FUSE INC /NJ
summary: Bel Fuse Inc. designs, manufactures, and markets products that power, protect, and connect electronic circuits. Its portfolio spans Power Solutions and Protection (front-end, board-mount, industrial, transportation power, circuit protection), Connectivity Solutions (fiber optic, copper, RF, RJ connectors, cable assemblies), and Magnetic Solutions (integrated connector modules, transformers, inductors). Products serve defense, commercial aerospace, networking, telecommunications, computing, industrial, transportation, eMobility, automotive, medical, broadcasting, and consumer electronics markets. Incorporated in 1949, Bel operates in North America, Europe, the Middle East, and Asia.

products.name: Front-end Power Products
products.description: AC-DC and DC-DC power conversion solutions for various industrial and networking applications.

products.name: Board-mount Power Products
products.description: Compact power modules designed for board-level integration in electronic systems.

products.name: Industrial and Transportation Power Products
products.description: Power solutions targeting industrial and transportation end markets including eMobility.

products.name: Circuit Protection Products
products.description: Devices designed to protect electronic circuits from overcurrent and overvoltage conditions.

products.name: Expanded Beam Fiber Optic Connectors
products.description: Fiber optic connectivity solutions for high-speed data transmission applications.

products.name: Copper-based Connectors
products.description: Copper connectivity products including RJ connectors and cable assemblies.

products.name: RF Connectors
products.description: Radio frequency connectors used in telecommunications and related applications.

products.name: Integrated Connector Modules
products.description: Magnetic components integrating connectors for networking and data transmission.

products.name: Power Transformers and Inductors
products.description: Discrete magnetic components used in power supply and electronic circuit applications.

products.name: Enercon Power Conversion and Networking Solutions
products.description: Highly customized power conversion and networking solutions for aerospace and defense markets across air, land, and sea applications.

partnerships.description: One-third noncontrolling investment in Germany-based innolectric to create strategic alliance focused on EV on-board power electronics and next-generation fast-charging technology.
